---
# File: slides/industry5-roadmap.qmd
title: "Socio-Technical Roadmapping"
subtitle: "Industry 5.0 Architectures"
date: 2026-06-10
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    history: true # Allows browser back-button to work per slide
    header-includes:
      - <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
---

## Slide 1: Core Framework

<div class="p-6 bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl">
  <p class="text-zinc-900 font-mono">Tailwind rules apply cleanly here.</p>
</div>

---

## Slide 2: Next Steps

- Press 'O' on your keyboard to see the slide grid map.
